name: Tapenade Verte (Green Olive Spread)
recipeIngredient: 12 oz jar pitted green salad olives, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or small mixer, combine the olives, shallot, lemon juice, and freshly ground pepper.
2. Add half of the olive oil to the mixture.
3. Pulse until the mixture reaches a coarse paste consistency.
4. For a smoother tapenade, use all of the olive oil and blend until creamy and smooth.
5. Serve with a sprinkling of chopped chives on vegetable crudites or thin slices of toasted baguette or sourdough bread.
